name: Central Bio Co., Ltd.
summary: CentralBio Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells windows, doors, ventilation flat ducts in the Middle East, Asia, and internationally. It offers PVC sashes, inner and ABS doors, system windows, profiles, stiffeners, handles and crescents, and other components. The company was formerly known as Joongang Lving Tech Co., Ltd. and changed its name to CentralBio Co., Ltd. in May 2019. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Anyang, South Korea.
